codeReview.summary: The footer implementation matches the feature requirements: `website/components/Footer.tsx` provides a semantic, dark-themed footer with the required GitHub/npm external links, 2026 copyright, and tagline, while `website/app/page.tsx` renders it as the final element after `<main>`. The reviewed handoff and transcript also show targeted tests plus manual browser verification confirming the footer is compact on desktop and sits flush at the bottom of the page.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `frontend-worker` skill still advertises `Vitest + React Testing Library`, but the mission conventions and the reviewed footer implementation use Bun's test runner. The worker followed the repo reality (`bun:test`), so the skill header is stale and could mislead future workers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md:12-20 says the skill is for `Component testing with Vitest + React Testing Library`, while the same skill's procedure at lines 30-34 says to use `bun:test`, mission AGENTS.md specifies Bun tests, and `website/components/Footer.test.tsx:1` imports from `bun:test`.

summary: Pass. The feature commit satisfies the footer requirements without introducing obvious regressions; no code issues were found. One shared-state observation: the `frontend-worker` skill description still mentions Vitest even though the website project uses Bun tests.
